Assess the validity of the following arguments. If the argument is valid,
provide a proof. If it is invalid, provide a counterexample.

a. $\some{A}{B}\proves\some{B}{A}$

b. $\all{A}{B}\proves\some{B}{A}$

c. $\no{A}{B}, \some{B}{A}\proves\somenot{D}{C}$

d. $\all{A}{B}, \some{C}{A}\proves\some{C}{B}$

e. $\somenot{A}{B}, \all{C}{B}\proves\somenot{A}{C}$

f. $\no{A}{B}, \some{C}{A}, \all{D}{B}\proves\somenot{C}{D}$
